title: GameJuice
description: GameJuice is a client-side mod dedicated to the concept of "Game Juice" — the idea that every interaction should feel responsive, weighty, and satisfying.
body:
🍊 GameJuice: Make Minecraft Tactile
Turn the "flat" vanilla experience into a satisfying action game.

GameJuice is a client-side mod dedicated to the concept of "Game Juice" — the idea that every interaction should feel responsive, weighty, and satisfying. It adds over 100 procedural visual effects, camera animations, and particle systems to breathe new life into the game without changing the core mechanics.

(Recommended: Insert a GIF here showing Combat + Sprinting)

✨ Why GameJuice?
Have you ever noticed how Minecraft trailers look more "alive" than the actual game? GameJuice bridges that gap.

⚡ Client-Side Only: Works on every server (Vanilla, SMPs, Mini-games).

🎮 Tactile Feel: Feel the weight of your armor, the impact of your sword, and the speed of your sprint.

⚙️ Fully Configurable: Press ] to open the in-game menu and toggle any system instantly.

🚀 Key Features
🏃‍♂️ Next-Gen Locomotion
Movement is no longer just sliding coordinates. It’s physical.

Smart Footsteps: Particles react to the block you are running on. Magma sparks, Soulsand releases souls, Slime blocks splash, and Mycelium releases spores.

Sprint Burst: A sudden camera impulse and dust cloud when you start sprinting.

Speed Lines: Anime-style wind lines appear at the edges of the screen when moving at high speeds (Elytra, Trident, or Sprint-Jumping).

Heavy Impact: Falling from a height causes a camera shake and a shockwave of dust.

⚔️ Visceral Combat
Combat now has "weight" and feedback.

Camera Shake: Feel the impact of every hit. Critical hits cause a heavier screen shake.

Directional Gore: Damage particles fly in the direction of your attack.

Mob-Specific Fluids: Slimes bleed slime, Blazes bleed fire, Endermen bleed portal particles, and Skeletons shatter bone dust.

Soul Release: A dramatic flash and rising soul particle upon killing a mob.

⛏️ Immersive Interactions
The world reacts to your tools and items.

Mining Sparks: Hitting stone or metal with a pickaxe creates electric sparks.

Eating: Crumbs fly out of your mouth based on the food item you are eating.

Magic: Enchanted swords and potions drip magical particles.

Bow Tension: Smoke rises from the bowstring when fully drawn.

🌍 Atmospheric Depth
Feel the temperature and environment.

Cold Breath: See your breath condense in snowy biomes or high altitudes.

Nether Heat: Sweat (lava droplets) drips from the player in the Nether or hot biomes.

Wet Effect: Water drips from your clothes for 5 seconds after exiting a lake or ocean.

Biome Ambience: Pollen in forests, ash in the Nether, and bubbles in the ocean.

⚙️ Configuration
You don't need to restart the game to change settings. Press ] (Right Bracket) in-game to open the GameJuice Hub.

Camera Shake: Can be disabled for accessibility/motion sickness.

Modules: Toggle entire systems (Combat, Movement, Ambience) on or off to suit your preference.
